recommendations.title: Enhance BRSR Disclosure on Clean Energy Projects
recommendations.description: Adani Power should improve its BRSR disclosures specifically detailing the 2,500 MW clean energy deal execution to avoid SEBI scrutiny and potential trading restrictions.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoiding a 20-40 bps increase in cost of capital on a ₹30,000 Cr market cap can save ₹60-120 Cr annually.

recommendations.title: Implement TCFD-Aligned Climate Risk Disclosure
recommendations.description: Publish detailed TCFD-aligned disclosures on transition risks and climate-related financial impacts of the clean energy deal to prevent FII outflows and P/E compression.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoiding a 5-10% P/E compression on ₹30,000 Cr market cap preserves ₹1,500-3,000 Cr in valuation.

recommendations.title: Align Clean Energy Reporting with EU Taxonomy
recommendations.description: Align the 2,500 MW clean energy project activities with EU Taxonomy criteria to unlock green financing options and reduce cost of capital.
recommendations.profitability_link: Reducing cost of capital by 30 bps on ₹30,000 Cr market cap can save ₹90 Cr annually.

recommendations.title: Establish Project Execution Monitoring Team
recommendations.description: Create a dedicated team to monitor and mitigate execution risks of the 2,500 MW clean energy contract to ensure timely delivery and maintain investor confidence.
recommendations.profitability_link: Reducing execution delays can prevent revenue loss of ₹200 Cr from delayed project commissioning.

recommendations.title: Improve GRI Disclosure on Environmental Impact
recommendations.description: Enhance GRI disclosures related to environmental metrics of the clean energy project to improve ESG ratings and attract sustainable fund inflows.
recommendations.profitability_link: Improved ESG ratings can reduce fund outflow by 2%, protecting ₹600 Cr in market cap value.
